descriptionTemplate:
Ryker obtains 5 Black Sigils upon killing an enemy. For every 1% Sigil Yield Ryker has, the amount obtained +1%, up to 5 times per exploration.
After obtaining 75/150/300 Black Sigils through battle, relic capacity +1, and at the end of the battle, choose a {Chaotic Legacy} to add to the relic list.
